SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Framework_Core_updateTrans - resume/revive/graveyard transactions on any environment (DEV/TEST/PROD)
Note that this service does not use an output template
in order to alter the format of the IDATA structure that is returned from all flow service calls, and if you are invoking this
service using an http call, you can choose json as the return format using the Accept http parameter:

BRANCH.COMMENT: depending on where the caller wants the action to occur...

SEQUENCE.NAME: environment==uienvironselection || clusterName == uienvironselection
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: perform the action on the local server

MAP.COMMENT: detailedMessage=A total of XXXX transaction(s) were successfully YYYY count=0

Values.value: A total of XXXX transaction(s) were successfully YYYY

SEQUENCE.NAME: %sRows% == 1
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: If 1 row deleted, it was a success

MAP.COMMENT: sMessage = "Transaction "; If sMessage starts with "Transaction ", it's identified as success (see below)

BRANCH.COMMENT: Look for "Transaction "; if sMessage starts with this, then the action was successful

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: execute this same procedure on the remote environment
